positive: A cosmic, stylized celestial animal portrait of a luminous, majestic fox spirit with long, flowing tails, rendered in a neo-traditional tattoo style. The fox should be positioned centrally, looking confident and serene, surrounded by swirling nebula elements, crescent moons, and minimalist constellations. The color palette should be limited to deep sapphire blues, glowing gold, ethereal lavender, and stark black ink accents, ensuring high contrast and visibility on fabric. The style must be highly graphic, clean line art with solid color blocking and glowing bioluminescent details. Vector-art quality, designed for apparel printing, intricate yet easily repeatable pattern element.
